ocr_findings.description: Mascot dog illustration and '試験にはコしが出る！' banner replaced by img-0.jpeg placeholder; the banner text itself is captured as plain text '試験にはつしが出る！' — minor wrong_char: 'コし' rendered as 'つし' (the stylized font glyph was misread). This is cosmetic as the heading is decorative.
Banner heading: image shows '試験にはコしが出る！' but OCR reads '試験にはつしが出る！' — 'コ' misread as 'つ'. Decorative heading, no meaning change to study content.

reviewer_notes: Page covers Digital Transformation (DX) explanation and a 'key exam points' summary box with 6 bullet points. All substantive prose and all 6 bullet-point items faithfully reproduced. Only a cosmetic wrong-char in the decorative banner heading.
